summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ZentraQR landing page redesign with ISO Meet inspired styling. All major features working correctly including dark theme, animations, navigation, and responsive design.

ui_bugs.issue: Mobile menu toggle does not properly show/hide navigation links on mobile devices

passed_tests: Landing page loads correctly with dark theme (#0A0F1C background)
ZentraQR branding and navbar navigation links all functional
Hero section displays correctly with animated elements and CTA buttons
Infinite marquee animation showing establishment types (Restaurantes, Cafés, Bares, etc.)
Features tabs switching between 'Para o Restaurante' and 'Para o Cliente' with content updates
CTA section with 'Começar Grátis por 7 Dias' button working
Navigation to /contact and /admin/login pages working correctly
Demo button navigation to menu page with proper parameters
Color scheme implemented correctly (Primary #1E40AF, Accent #10B981, Dark theme)
Typography using custom fonts (Outfit for headings, Plus Jakarta Sans for body)
Responsive design elements visible on mobile viewport
Button hover effects and animations working
Visual design matches ISO Meet style requirements
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix mobile menu toggle functionality - menu should properly show/hide navigation links when clicked on mobile devices. The mobile menu button is present but the dropdown navigation is not appearing when clicked.
